EVE soft 7-07

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 37
Func Name: Onduleur

    "sentbytes": "319000",
    "name": "Calage capteur position",

  },

      },

        "firstbyte": 5,

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true,
